title: TaskEdited payload
description: Emitted when a task's content fields change via task_edit or forge_edit(task) — problem_statement, acceptance_criteria, context_required, constraints, handoff_output, etc. Status transitions DO NOT emit this event (they emit TaskTransitioned / TaskCompleted / TaskCancelled per their semantics). Position changes within a chain emit TaskAssignedToChain. updated_fields carries the list of changed field names; updated_values (added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement, §9.4) carries the post-edit values for each changed column so payload-only fold reconstruction can rebuild proj_current_tasks without re-reading the CRUD row.

chain_slug.description: Chain slug disambiguating which chain's task this event targets, so the fold scopes to one task rather than fanning out across same-slug tasks in the project (bug task-lifecycle-event-folds-fan-out-across-duplicate-task-slugs). Optional: pre-fix events omit it and the fold falls back to the legacy slug+project match.

updated_fields.description: Snake-case names of the task fields that changed in this edit. At least one entry — a no-op edit must not emit this event.

updated_values.description: Added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement (§9.4 audit finding). Map of changed-column-name → new value. Keys mirror updated_fields exactly; values carry the post-edit content for each column so the projection fold can reconstruct proj_current_tasks from payload alone (T5's contract). Optional for backward compatibility with pre-T3 events; once T5 lands, every new event carries this.
